name: Remix: Multiplayer Neon Snake
description:
Collect orbs to dominate the neon grid in this real-time multiplayer snake game. 
A bigger snake can eat a smaller snake. If that happens the smaller snake looses width and the bigger snake gets more fat.
Bigger snakes move slower than small snakes. 
Add a Type name screen before starting. 
Add the ability to create rooms so I can share the room link and play with my friends
